creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
KShutDown is an advanced shutdown utility for KDE.

Features:
 - Turn Off or Restart Computer
 - Hibernate to disk or Suspend
 - Lock Screen using a screen saver
 - Various time and delay options (time from now, inactivity detection, ...)
 - Command line support
 - Free and Open Source
 - KDE 4: Extras (additional, external user commands)

WWW: http://kshutdown.sourceforge.net/
